qt: The Baluchistan Education Sector Plan recommends __________interventions for inclusive Education.

op: Develop and institutionalize a DRR policy for education in Baluchistan.
Create awareness among all the stakeholders regarding causes, events and effects of various kinds of disasters.

qt: The key strategic objectives are of higher education of Baluchistan are______________.
op: To improve quality of undergraduate programs through laying the basis for transition to a four year program.
Improvements of outcomes of higher education for students.

op: An Assessment system that promotes rote learning (similar to the BISE).

Managerial efficiency is a _________________.

function of individual capacity and institutional practices and structures.
energy of a manager to complete a task

qt: In order to achieve the interventions for inclusive education the BESP suggest__________.
op: Good relationship between teacher and students

qt: BACT stands for __________________.

The disparity between the numbers of male and female teachers is quite distinct at the _________.

SESP vision can be translated in practical terms as a commitment under the SESP to focus on ____________.
op: Supporting greater community and parental involvement in their children’s education
Delivering educational services to the most vulnerable and marginalized children.

qt: The National Education Policy 2009  guides reforms in the following three area_____.
Which one of the following is the Key policy Actions for Education Management and Governance – NEP 2009__________.
Which one of the following is the point of SESP policies for enhanced equity in education access and participation___________.
op: appropriate physical and learning environment will be guaranteed to promote enrollments, retention and learning.
Strengthening governance and service delivery by improving the functioning capacity from the school community level up to district and province level.
Improving the quality of teachers through merit based selection and recruitment as well as establishing a competency-based constructivist system of educational professional development.

Enhancing the equity of resource allocation and improving the fiscal sustainability and effectiveness of educational expenditure, thereby fostering transparency and accountability in the use of public resources.

_________elements will be given priority as a way to ensure improved quality

School consolidation covers three types of school_________.
op: Schools that are within a stipulated distance of each other

qt: The following steps will need to be taken in order to achieve the SESP objectives for Education governance and accountability________.
op: Design and develop an independent data collection and monitoring system.
